provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, reptilian Veshan warrior wearing an Orryn-style flowing curved teal vest with magnetic clips over Compact-style pressed rectangular trousers with Keth bio-luminescent accessories, the outfit combines shape languages and material vocabularies from four different civilizations in a way that no actual person in this universe would dress, it looks like a costume designer grabbed random pieces from different factions

judgment.explanation: Teal leather vest with brown leather pants and arm bracers on a muscular man. Reads as generic fantasy adventurer, not any specific faction. The teal suggests Orryn but the construction is leather not woven. Violates MAT-001 and SHP-001.
